name: if_lines
query:
SELECT
  ((stage_id - 1) * 4 + line) AS line_id,  -- ID único da linha
  stage_id,
  line,
  availability_line,
  performance_line,
  quality_line,
  ROUND(availability_line * performance_line * quality_line, 4) AS oee_line,
  CASE
    WHEN ROUND(availability_line * performance_line * quality_line, 2) >= 0.83 THEN 0
    WHEN ROUND(availability_line * performance_line * quality_line, 2) >= 0.70 THEN 1
    ELSE 2
  END AS alert
FROM (
  SELECT
    a.stage_id,
    a.line,
    MIN(o.availability) AS availability_line,
    MIN(o.performance)  AS performance_line,
    MIN(o.quality)      AS quality_line
  FROM if_assets a
  JOIN if_assets_oee o
    ON o.asset_id = a.asset_id
  WHERE a.line IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY a.stage_id, a.line
) x
ORDER BY stage_id, line;
